Book a stay
Home·Offers·The Long Weekend
Stay 4, pay 3 · direct only

The Long Weekend

Book four nights or more on a single stay and the fourth is on the house — any room, any season. One fewer night to pay for, one more to linger.

The offer Ends 30 Sep 2026

Give yourself the extra day

The best stays never feel long enough. Book four nights or more with us directly and we take the fourth off the bill — so you can slow down, sleep in, and see the city at its own pace. It works on every room and suite, and every season of the year.

Because you're booking straight with us, there are no agents in the middle and no booking fees — the discounted total below is exactly what you pay.

How it works

1
Pick four nights or moreChoose any arrival date and stay at least four consecutive nights in a single booking.
2
Choose any roomFrom the Deluxe King to The Penthouse — the offer applies to every room type, in every season.
3
The fourth night is freeWe deduct one night automatically at checkout. Stay eight nights and two come off.

Every Long Weekend includes

The fourth night, free
Breakfast for two, daily
Rooftop pool, gym & spa access
Late checkout until 1pm on departure
Wi-Fi & secure parking
No booking fees, ever

Works on every room

Prices below are the nightly rate — the fourth night comes off automatically at checkout.

Deluxe KingSleeps 2 · city view
R3,900 /night
Executive SuiteSleeps 3 · private terrace
R6,800 /night
The PenthouseSleeps 4 · rooftop pool
R13,500 /night

The fine print

  • Valid on new direct bookings for stays of four or more consecutive nights, for arrivals up to 30 September 2026.
  • The lowest-priced night of the stay is the one deducted. Stays of eight-plus nights receive two free nights.
  • Subject to availability and cannot be combined with other offers or corporate rates.
  • Free cancellation up to 48 hours before arrival; the full stay is charged on the day of arrival.
Stay 4, pay 3

RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
